CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_time DateTime64(9), event_description String);
WITH toDateTime64('2024-01-01 00:00:00', 9) AS date_time SELECT subtractNanoseconds(date_time, 1000000) AS adjusted_time;

WITH toDateTime64('2024-01-01 00:00:00', 9) AS date_time, '2024-01-01 00:00:00' AS date_time_string SELECT subtractNanoseconds(date_time, 500000) AS adjusted_time_time, subtractNanoseconds(date_time_string, 500000) AS adjusted_time_string;
WITH (SELECT max(event_time) FROM test_dates) AS max_time SELECT subtractNanoseconds(max_time, 2000000) AS max_time_adjusted;
WITH (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_description = 'Event 1') AS specific_event_time SELECT subtractNanoseconds(specific_event_time, 7500000) AS adjusted_specific_event_time;
WITH (SELECT toDateTime64('2024-01-01 12:30:00', 9)) AS outer_time SELECT subtractNanoseconds(outer_time, 3000000) AS adjusted_outer_time;
WITH (SELECT avg(toUnixTimestamp(event_time)) FROM test_dates) AS avg_timestamp SELECT subtractNanoseconds(toDateTime64(avg_timestamp, 9), 1000000) AS adjusted_avg_timestamp;
SELECT event_description, subtractNanoseconds(event_time, 1000000) AS adjusted_event_time FROM test_dates;

SELECT t1.*, subtractNanoseconds(t2.event_time, 5000000) AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN (SELECT event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_description = 'Event 1') AS t2 ON t1.event_time > t2.event_time;
